2005October 16, 2005

🇨🇳 Hangzhou, China

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Hangzhou, China, October 16, 2005 -- October 21, 2005

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2005-10-hangzhou-china

12 Resolutions

662Plenary
Nominate Howard Mason to TMB ad hoc meeting on Publication of Standards as databases
SC 4 nominates its chairman Howard Mason to attend the ISO/TMB ad hoc meeting on 2005-11-10/11 in Geneva. The objective of this nomination is to reflect the interest of SC 4 projects and users of S...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
661Plenary
Establish liaison to ISO/TC 60 Gears
SC 4 establishes a liaison to ISO/TC 60 Gears to enable a close cooperation on data exchange for gears. To avoid inconsistencies and incompatibilities with existing SC 4 standards, SC 4 nominates A...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
660Plenary
Assign ISO 22745 Open Technical Dictionary project to WG 12
SC 4 assigns the Open Technical Dictionary Project to WG 12.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
659Plenary
Disband Task Force on Dictionaries, Part Libraries and Reference Data Libraries
SC 4 disbands the Task Force.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
658Plenary
Recommend national bodies review ISO/IEC JWG 1 guide ballots
SC 4 recommends that National Bodies ensure that any ballot on these documents is reviewed by their representatives to SC 4 and other affected Technical Committees.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
657Plenary
Nominate Jean-Jacques MICHEL as liaison to ISO/TC 184/SC 5/WG 7
In addition to the appointments and nominations stated in SC 4 Resolution # 646, SC 4 proposes that the ISO/TC 184/SC 4/JWG 8 Convener, Jean-Jacques MICHEL, be nominated as expert to SC 5/WG 7 by i...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
656Plenary
Establish liaison with ISO/TC 37/SC 2, 3 and 4
SC 4 requests an active two-way liaison with ISO/TC 37/SC 2, 3 and 4, and requests the SC 4 Secretary to confirm these liaisons with the ISO Central Secretariat.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
655Plenary
Terminate liaison with PLCS, Inc.
SC 4 terminates its liaison with PLCS, Inc. The liaison with OASIS established under resolutions 580 and 629 remains in place, in order to address any SC 4 standardisation requirements arising from...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
654Plenary
Approve project leader and editor for ISO 10303-0059
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-0059 |Hiroyuki Hiraoka |Akihiko Otaka |===
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
Appreciation to our SC 4 Liaisons. We appreciate your representation to and for ISO/TC 184/SC 4. A special thank you to the SC 4 Liaison Plenary presenters for their insightful and comprehensive pr...

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 wishes to give its unanimous thanks to CNIS, its Members and the staff of the HangZhou Huagang HNA Resort Hotel for their efforts in organizing this meeting, arranging the facilities, excellen...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its thanks to Mr. Bisong Liu and his staff, Mr. Guangli Qin, Mr. Junfeng Zhan, Mr. Wenfeng Sun, Mr. Hanjing Hu, Mr. Wenwu Li, Mr. Yan Hong, Ms. Xiaojing Zhang and Ms. Ping Xu for the...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
